Experimental Evidence for a Link between Labor Market Competition and Anti-Immigrant Attitudes

45 Pages Posted: 6 Jul 2017 Last revised: 4 Jul 2019

Abstract

Anti-immigrant sentiment has become central to politics in Western Democracies.

Keywords: immigration, labor market, economic threat

Suggested Citation: Mellon, Jonathan, Experimental Evidence for a Link between Labor Market Competition and Anti-Immigrant Attitudes (March 22, 2019). Available at SSRN: https://ssrn.com/abstract=2997321
